title: hieracium ramosissimum subsp. cryptadenophyllum
intro: Hieracium ramosissimum subsp. cryptadenophyllum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Hieracium. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in water or a solvent.
